The hallucinated Apple Inc. payload has been thoroughly purged. Jiangsu Boyue Electric Technology Co., Ltd. presents a textbook paradox of heavy industry claims versus micro-commercial reality. Officially categorized as an 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturer', its business scope boasts the manufacturing of heavy power distribution switches, control equipment, and lighting fixtures. However, the physical reality shatters this industrial façade: the entity operates with just 2 insured employees and a minimal 400,000 RMB paid-in capital. This is an asset-light Mechanical & Electrical (M&E) and Security Systems Integration micro-node. The 2-person team acts as a dealer/installer, purchasing hardware from actual OEMs to fulfill local commercial contracts for security, lighting, and power distribution setups.
